FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Dollar Holds Firmer as JPY Weakens on Risk-On Tone
tldr_points: Dollar firm on hawkish Fed risk
JPY pressured by risk-on flows and gold consolidation
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY nudges higher to 158.00 as dollar holds firm amid hawkish Fed and risk-on tone.
FX.comment: Dollar firm on hawkish Fed and risk-on tone, targeting 158.00+

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] NEUTRAL: Mixed Signals Amid Fed Warning and Tech Trade Developments
tldr_points: Fed warning raises caution despite tech trade optimism
Michael Burry's warning adds contrarian perspective
Technical levels remain undefined amid uncertainty
STOCKS.excerpt: Fed warning counters tech optimism as S&P 500 faces mixed signals.
STOCKS.comment: Mixed signals between Fed warning and tech trade developments warrant caution

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: AI detects MA20 support aligning with bullish tokenization catalysts
RSI(14) shows oversold rebound with buying pressure
Volume surge on spot BTC/ETF launch fuels upside momentum
CRYPTO.excerpt: AI spots MA20 support; bullish tokenization news; RSI oversold rebound; volume spikes on ETF launch, signaling upside.
CRYPTO.comment: AI spots MA20 support; bullish tokenization news; RSI oversold rebound; volume spikes on ETF launch, signaling upside.
